steps.assistant_text: Logic bug: slot pick INVERTED (i=1 when st->0x48 != 1). Shape: dominating i=0 in an outer ELSE arm emits the target bne/nop + two-b diamond and flips s2/s3 coloring (an inner-diamond form collapses to beql). Real callees per relocs; site-1 base-first text (int)st + i*4 + 0x34 for addu t9,s3,t8.
